label: exam

ocr_findings.note: Mistral misread the '試験にはコレが出る！' callout as 'つなが出る！'. Not leaked into structured/output.

narrative: Three question entities (p331::0, p331::1, p331::2) have JP stems and choices that match the OCR source verbatim. Answer indices 1, 1, 2 correctly map to イ, イ, ウ per OCR answer key '問題9-1 イ 問題9-2 イ 問題9-3 ウ'. The misread callout was correctly suppressed. 16進数 A3 answer ウ=163 is mathematically correct (10×16+3=163).
